case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP vs. CLARK, ERNESTINE

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, ERNESTINE
